name: White Sauce
description: What is the secret of this rare white sauce, what mysteries does it hold? It is a question hotly debated by pizza scholars to this very day. - DS

name: Deep Space
description: It's really far out there man
artistBio: Contributing artist to the Rare Pizzas collection with multiple toppings spanning Crust, Sauce, and more. Known for imaginative designs from Moon Crust to Deep Space.
